title: stylidium scabridum
intro: Stylidium scabridum, also known as kidney root, is a plant species native to Australia and is a member of the Stylidium genus, which consists of over 300 species of trigger plants. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of stylidium scabridum include its ability to treat kidney issues, such as nephritis and pyelitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, stylidium scabridum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
